name: zsc-cli
description: ZeroServer Community Cloud CLI — deploy and manage apps from the terminal

scripts.build:binary: pnpm build:bundle && pkg build/zs.cjs --no-bytecode --public -t node22-linux-x64 --output dist-bin/zs-linux-x64 && pkg build/zs.cjs --no-bytecode --public -t node22-linux-arm64 --output dist-bin/zs-linux-arm64 && pkg build/zs.cjs --no-bytecode --public -t node22-macos-arm64 --output dist-bin/zs-macos-arm64
scripts.build:binary:host: pnpm build:bundle && pkg build/zs.cjs --no-bytecode --public --targets host --output dist-bin/zs
